title: pleurospermum govanianum
intro: Pleurospermum govanianum, also known as Govaan's Carrot or Govaan's Pleuro, is a plant species in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to the Himalayan region. The plant's roots and rhizomes have been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Pleurospermum govanianum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make a decoction or infusion, and it can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
